sections.features: Ferniが見ることができるもの

wearableSettings.title: 健康とフィットネス

insights.moodSummary: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] You've been feeling mostly {mood} this week

demo.banner: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Here's a glimpse of the story we could write together. Start a conversation to begin yours.

memoryBrowser.title: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] What I Remember
memoryBrowser.subtitle: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Browse our conversations and what I've learned about you

empty.conversations: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Our story begins here. Let's talk and I'll remember every moment.
empty.remembered: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] I haven't learned much about you yet. The more we talk, the more I'll remember!
empty.topics: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] No topics explored yet. Let's start a conversation!

error.title: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Couldn't load your memories
error.message: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Something went wrong. Please try again.

foundersJourney.title: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] We're Just Getting Started
foundersJourney.subtitle: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] No hype. No inflated numbers. Just a small team trying to build something that helps people.

vision.quote: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Good support is expensive. Good therapists have waitlists. Friends get tired. What if there was something in between?

free.title: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Free, Honestly
free.description: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Every conversation costs about $0.05 to run. Founders help cover that so others don't have to.

community.title: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Small, Not Scale
community.description: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] We're not trying to be the next big thing. We just want to build something genuinely useful for the people who find us.

human.title: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Not a Replacement
human.description: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Ferni isn't therapy. It's not a substitute for real help. It's support for the 99% of moments that don't need a professional.

vision.promise: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Your contribution covers about 20 conversations for someone who can't chip in.

now.title: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Where We Actually Are
now.description: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Honest about the stage: early. Most features work. Some have rough edges. We're learning.

wins.memory: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Memory works — Ferni remembers conversations across sessions
wins.team: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Six coaches with different personalities (they're real, not gimmicks)
wins.voice: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Voice conversations work, though latency varies by connection

future.title: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] What We're Working On
future.description: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] No promises on dates. We ship when it's ready, not when marketing wants it.

impact.title: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Real Numbers
impact.description: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] We show what we actually have. Empty is honest. Inflated is not.
impact.noStories: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] No stories yet. When real people share them, they'll appear here.
impact.ctaText: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Ferni costs money to run. Your support keeps it free for people who need it.

founders.title: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] The People Who Believe
founders.description: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Real names of real people who chose to support this. (With their permission.)
founders.joinCta: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Every name here is a real person.

footer.note: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] If you can't support financially, that's completely fine. Use Ferni anyway. That's the whole point.

community.name: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Community
community.description: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Ferni is free. Really free. Talk whenever you need.

friend.name: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Founding Member
friend.description: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Chip in $10/mo. Help keep Ferni free for everyone.

features.meetTeam: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Meet the whole team (Maya, Peter, Alex, Jordan)
features.foundersWall: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Your name on the Founders Wall (optional)
features.voteOnFeatures: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Vote on what we build next

partner.name: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Founding Patron
partner.description: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Chip in $20/mo. You're shaping what we become.

features.familySharing: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Family sharing — bring people you love

vibe.title: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Set the Vibe

focus.name: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Focus
focus.description: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Deep work mode. Calm music, bright lights, cool temp.

relax.name: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Relax
relax.description: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Wind down. Soft jazz, warm dim lights, cozy temp.

energize.name: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Energize
energize.description: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Get moving. Upbeat music, bright cool lights.

sleep.name: [NEEDS_TRANSLATION] Sleep
